description_text: Kjjeep: Cars & Motorcycles' Paradise Item description Item Description: Universal Lower Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit PU Spoiler Black Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Universal custom fitment; Professional installation is required Specifications: Material: ABS Plastic Color:Gloss Black Dimension: 58 x 14.5 cm Fitment Type: Performance/Custom Surface Finish:Gloss Black Placement on Vehicle: Rear Package Included: 1x Rear Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit (adhesive tape are included) Notice: - Please allow 1-3CM differs due to manual measurement. - Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your understanding. Product overview
